rules.name: SSH Brute Force Attack
rules.description: More than N failed SSH logins from a single source IP

rules.name: Password Spray Attack
rules.description: Failed logins targeting many unique users from one IP

rules.name: Account Compromise Indicator
rules.description: Successful login from IP that previously failed many times

rules.name: Port Scan Detection
rules.description: Multiple refused connections from single source

rules.name: Excessive Sudo Activity
rules.description: Unusual volume of privileged command executions
